title: LILBEE LOGICS
description: A dynamic portfolio and digital agency platform built to showcase high-quality digital experiences.
longDescription: LILBEE LOGICS is the core agency platform highlighting a wide array of web development and design projects. It encapsulates modern web design principles and seamless animations to craft stunning user experiences.

title: NEXA A.I
description: An advanced artificial intelligence web interface for deep natural language processing.
longDescription: NEXA A.I leverages modern Large Language Models and dynamic front-end frameworks to deliver a seamless, chat-based UI. Users can interact with intelligent agents directly through the browser.

title: School Management System
description: A comprehensive portal for managing students, teachers, and administrative tasks in educational institutions.
longDescription: This application serves as a complete dashboard for administrators to track attendance, grades, and schedules. It features distinct role-based access for students and teachers alongside complex database queries.

title: Campuz Connect
description: A social networking platform explicitly meant to connect university students across campuses.
longDescription: Campuz Connect bridges the gap between students, allowing them to share resources, post updates, and communicate in real-time. It acts as a dedicated central hub for the college community.

title: Sound Haven
description: A sleek music discovery space offering curated tracks and dynamic audio visualizers.
longDescription: Sound Haven provides a beautifully designed interface for music lovers to discover and play tracks. It integrates complex UI layouts and audio APIs to give an immersive listening experience.

title: Ngaru Church Web
description: An elegant, responsive website tailored to bring the Ngaru community together.
longDescription: Designed specifically for Ngaru Church, this platform hosts sermon archives, event schedules, and community donation links. It employs a serene, welcoming aesthetic meant to reflect the church's values.

title: Mwaithira Beauty Salon
description: A booking and showcase website for a modern styling beauty salon.
longDescription: This web application allows customers to browse the salon's services, view pricing, and observe a gallery of past styling jobs. The site is optimized for mobile access and quick load times.

title: Creative Graphics Portfolio
description: A curated collection of my best graphic design and branding projects.
longDescription: This project serves as a premium showcase of advanced visual identities, user interface mockup ecosystems, and high-fidelity vector illustrations. Every project featured was meticulously crafted using Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and Figma to bridge the gap between abstract branding concepts and tangible digital experiences.
